course_correction_note.trigger: Three handler-local fixes failed because the payment-before-confirmation invariant spans two independently committed services without a shared transaction, durable outbox, or ordering coordinator; local implementation must stop pending an architecture decision.
evidence_refs: Failure Boundary: under a broker partition, OrderConfirmed can become visible before PaymentAuthorized
Three Failed Local Fixes: retry, fixed consumer delay, and process-local flag all failed to preserve ordering
Structural Evidence and Constraints: a fourth handler patch cannot establish cross-service atomic ordering
preserved_constraints: Preserve backward compatibility for existing event consumers
Preserve the current incident containment flag while architecture is corrected
Do not weaken the payment-before-confirmation invariant
